title: shorea submontana
intro: Shorea submontana, also known as the submontane shorea, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae that is native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Shorea submontana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin infections, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Shorea submontana can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as extracts, oils, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
